# Trvel

> Premium travel eSIMs for 190+ destinations. Australian-owned. Instant QR code delivery. 10-minute connection guarantee or full refund.

Trvel provides unlimited data eSIM plans for international travellers. Plans start from A$4.99 with instant digital delivery via QR code. 24/7 multilingual support in English, Malay, and Indonesian. Trusted by 50,000+ travellers with a 4.9/5 rating.

## Main Pages

- [How It Works](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/how-it-works): Step-by-step eSIM purchase, installation, and activation guide
- [All Destinations](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/destinations): Browse eSIM plans for 190+ countries
- [Device Compatibility](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/compatibility): Check if your phone supports eSIM (iPhone, Samsung, Google Pixel, etc.)
- [Customer Reviews](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/reviews): Verified customer testimonials and ratings
- [Help Center](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/help): FAQs, troubleshooting, and support contact

## Popular Destinations

- [Japan eSIM](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/japan): Unlimited data on NTT Docomo network. Plans from A$4.99.
- [Thailand eSIM](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/thailand): Unlimited data on AIS network. Plans from A$4.99.
- [South Korea eSIM](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/south-korea): 4G/5G coverage nationwide on SK Telecom.
- [Singapore eSIM](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/singapore): Premium carrier access across the island.
- [Indonesia eSIM](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/indonesia): Coverage across Bali, Jakarta, and all major islands.
- [Malaysia eSIM](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/malaysia): Unlimited data on Celcom/Maxis networks.
- [Vietnam eSIM](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/vietnam): Nationwide 4G/5G coverage.
- [France eSIM](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/france): Coverage across metropolitan France.
- [Italy eSIM](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/italy): Nationwide coverage on premium networks.
- [United Kingdom eSIM](https://www.trvel.co/en-au/united-kingdom): Full UK coverage including Scotland and Wales.

## Plan Types

Trvel offers three plan durations per destination:
- **Short Trip** (5 days): Ideal for weekend getaways and short business trips
- **Week Away** (7 days): Most popular option for standard holidays
- **Extended Stay** (10-15 days): For longer holidays and multi-destination trips

All plans include unlimited data with no throttling, instant QR code delivery, and 24/7 customer support.

## Pricing

- Prices vary by destination and duration
- All prices include unlimited data
- Supported currencies: AUD, SGD, GBP, USD, MYR, IDR, CAD, NZD
- 10-minute connection guarantee: full refund if you can't connect within 10 minutes of arrival

## Supported Locales

- [Australia (AUD)](https://www.trvel.co/en-au)
- [Singapore (SGD)](https://www.trvel.co/en-sg)
- [United Kingdom (GBP)](https://www.trvel.co/en-gb)
- [United States (USD)](https://www.trvel.co/en-us)
- [Malaysia (MYR)](https://www.trvel.co/ms-my)
- [Indonesia (IDR)](https://www.trvel.co/id-id)
